title: Here's Why You Should Retain Stryker (SYK) Stock For Now
text: Stryker (SYK) continues to benefit from strength in the robotic arm-assisted surgery platform, Mako, and its broad product portfolio. However, pricing pressure weighs on it.

title: Stryker opens the OR of the Future for customers to experience tomorrow's OR today
text: This operating room model puts increased focus on design for patient and staff safety, productivity and operational efficiency—further enabling improvements in quality of care FLOWER MOUND, Texas , Nov. 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Stryker (NYSE:SYK), one of the world's leading medical technology companies, unveiled the OR of the Future—a model operating room inside Stryker's Flower Mound facility, providing a one-of-a-kind interactive experience for customers to conceptualize new OR design and technology. Constructed with patient safety and OR uptime in mind, the model is designed and integrated to help enhance protection against infection and increase cleanability, while employing intelligent technology and time-efficiency components.

title: 2 Under-the-Radar Medtech Stocks to Buy Now
text: Don't count out these discounted medical technology stocks.

title: Stryker to participate in the 5th Annual Evercore ISI HealthCONx Conference
text: Kalamazoo, Michigan, Nov. 03, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Stryker (NYSE:SYK) will participate in the 5th Annual Evercore ISI HealthCONx Conference on Thursday, December 1, 2022.

title: Stryker's (SYK) Q3 Earnings Miss Estimates, Volume Improves
text: Stryker's (SYK) third-quarter earnings reflect strong performance across its segments. However, unfavorable currency movement hurt sales growth.
